summary: Complete testing of GoSocial landing page redesign with REVE Chat style. All 29 backend tests passed (100%). Landing page renders all sections correctly - hero, solutions, AI bento, CRM bento, features, pricing, CTA, and footer. All interactive tabs (Solution tabs, Feature tabs) switch content correctly. Navigation flows (Start for free -> Login -> Register -> Dashboard) work perfectly.
passed_tests: Landing page hero section with CTA buttons renders correctly
Landing page navbar has Features, Solutions, Pricing links
Solution tabs (Lead Scoring, AI Copilot, Campaign) switch content correctly with stat cards
Lead Scoring tab shows 80%, 35%, 2X stats
AI Copilot tab shows 3X, 60%, 92% stats
Campaign tab shows 5X, 48%, 23% stats
Solution banner updates with tab selection
AI Sales Copilot bento grid section renders 6 feature cards
Unified smart CRM section renders with 5 bento grid cards
Features section with pill tabs (Lead Scoring, AI Copilot, CRM Inbox, Analytics, Templates, Outreach) all present
Feature tabs switch mockup content correctly
Pricing section shows 3 plans - Starter $29, Growth $79, Enterprise $199
Final CTA section with 'Step into the era' heading renders
Multi-column footer with Products, Channels, Solutions, GoSocial, Resources columns
Start for free button navigates to login page
Login page loads with Sign In/Sign Up tabs and Google OAuth button
User registration creates account and navigates to dashboard
Dashboard loads with 7-day Growth trial notification
All sidebar navigation links work (Dashboard, Leads, CRM, Analytics, Templates, Billing, Settings)
Settings page shows subscription info with trial badge
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - user registration
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - user login
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - get current user
Backend: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/leads - leads CRUD
Backend: GET /api/conversations - conversations
Backend: POST /api/ai/suggest-reply - AI suggestions
Backend: POST /api/ai/score-lead - AI scoring
Backend: GET /api/analytics/overview - analytics
Backend: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/templates - templates CRUD
Backend: GET/PUT /api/settings - settings
Backend: GET /api/billing/plans - billing plans
Backend: GET /api/billing/subscription - subscription status
Backend: POST /api/seed-data - seed demo data
critical_code_review_comments: Landing page redesign is well-implemented with REVE Chat style
All data-testid attributes are properly added for testing
Interactive tabs maintain proper state management
All new sections have good visual hierarchy and spacing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all landing page features and flows working)

seed_data_creation: None created - used registration flow for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page redesign fully tested and working. All new sections render correctly: hero, solution tabs, AI bento grid (6 cards), CRM bento grid (5 cards), feature tabs (6 pill tabs), pricing (3 plans), final CTA, and multi-column footer. Interactive elements all working - tabs switch content correctly. Registration and login flows functional. Backend unchanged from iteration_4 - all 29 API tests still passing.
